profile.summary: My current work focuses on embodied intelligence and world models. I share my thoughts on Bilibili every day, and I am also deeply interested in blockchain, cryptography, and quantum computing, topics I regularly discuss through video content as well. If you are working in related areas, I would be very happy to connect over a coffee chat.
profile.platformAliasNote: On Bilibili, RedNote, Douyin, WeChat Official Account, and WeChat Channels, I publish under the name "马腾飞每天更新" (Ma Tengfei Daily Updates).

products.name: Polymarket Oracle
products.tagline: LLM-powered analysis built on top of Polymarket data
products.description: Polymarket Oracle uses data from Polymarket to help an LLM analyze your questions and generate clearer, market-informed insights.
highlights: Combines prediction market data with LLM-based reasoning
Helps users explore questions through market signals and structured analysis
Built as a public-facing product that can be accessed directly online

publications.intro: A concise selection of publications and research outputs from my Google Scholar profile.
publications.sourceNote: This section is populated from my public Google Scholar profile and kept intentionally concise.

items.title: Beyond Centralized AI: Blockchain-Enabled Decentralized Learning
items.authors: D Wang, T Ma, J Zhu, H Duan
items.abstract: A concise overview of how blockchain can support decentralized learning systems beyond the standard centralized AI pipeline.

items.title: Derelayl: Sustainable decentralized relay learning
items.authors: H Duan, T Ma, Y Qin, R Zeng, W Cai, VCM Leung, X Hu
items.abstract: This work studies a sustainable decentralized relay learning framework for more efficient and robust distributed intelligence.

items.title: Artemix: A community-boosting-based framework for airdrop hunter detection in the web3 community
items.authors: Y Qin, T Ma, H Chen, H Duan
items.abstract: A framework for detecting airdrop hunters in Web3 communities by modeling community behavior and incentive-driven participation patterns.
